This time, I joined a small group of 6 people with only a driver-guide. The advantage is that with fewer people, moving around is faster.
translations.下車往前走過個馬路就到今天要下榻的溫泉飯店了！\n: Get off the bus and walk straight across the street to reach the hot spring hotel where we will stay today!
translations.二樓也有一些伴手禮。\n\n: There are also some souvenirs on the second floor.
translations.位置在定山溪溫泉街的入口。\n\n: Located at the entrance of Jozankei Onsen Street.
translations.位置在札幌車站後站步行約 5 分鐘。\n\n: Located about a 5-minute walk from the back exit of Sapporo Station.
translations.來的時間早站在第一排，北海獅真的好巨大！\n\n: Arrived early and stood in the front row. The sea lions are really huge!
translations.停車場往上走就能看到青池。\n\n: Walk up from the parking lot to see the Blue Pond.
translations.先穿過圓山公園(這裡還有很多積雪)，就能看到神宮鳥居入口了：\n\n: First, pass through Maruyama Park (there is still a lot of snow here), and you will see the entrance to the Jingu Torii gate:
translations.先高速公路＋進入深山的山路，真的蠻遠的。\n\n: First the highway, then entering the mountain road deep in the forest—it’s really quite far.
translations.入境蠻快的但是等了很久的行李，不知道是不是人太多(所有機位都賣完)。\n\n: Immigration was quite fast, but the luggage took a long time to arrive. Not sure if it was because there were too many people (all seats were sold out).
translations.公園有公共泡腳的浴池跟可以煮水煮蛋的湧口。\n\n: The park has a public footbath and a hot spring outlet where you can boil eggs.
translations.冬天摩天輪封閉中，摩天輪不在水族館園區內要另外買票\n: The Ferris wheel is closed in winter. It is not inside the aquarium area and requires a separate ticket.
translations.出機場一路跟著「國內線、JR 線」指標一路走。\n\n: Follow the signs for "Domestic Flights, JR Line" all the way from the airport.
translations.分配到最邊邊的報到櫃檯，還有走 165 公尺才會到：\n\n: Assigned to the check-in counter at the far end, and you have to walk 165 meters to reach it:
translations.分配到邊邊角角，06:10 才開櫃。\n\n: Assigned to the far corners, the counter opens only at 06:10.
translations.到另一棟大廳後下去 B1F 就是 JR 站了。(手扶梯的話還要再繞一下)\n\n: After reaching the other building's lobby, go down to B1F to find the JR station. (If using the escalator, you need to take a little detour.)
translations.剛好分配到靠窗的位子，窗外景色非常幽美。\n\n: I happened to get a window seat, and the view outside was very beautiful.
translations.務必記得帳號密碼，因為是電子車票直接線上啟用給司機確認。\n: Be sure to remember your account and password, as the e-ticket is activated online directly for the driver to verify.
translations.北海道札幌市區散策、定山溪泡湯、富良野精靈台與美瑛青池點燈行程全記錄\n\n: Complete Record of Walking in Sapporo City, Soaking in Jozankei, and Illuminations at Furano Fairy Hill and Biei Blue Pond
translations.午餐隨意吃了百貨公司的散壽司＋蕎麥麵\n\n: For lunch, I casually had chirashi sushi and soba noodles at the department store.
translations.只是路過，主要是去隔壁的札幌三井吃燒肉：\n\n: Just passing by, mainly heading to the neighboring Sapporo Mitsui for yakiniku:
translations.可以想像之前的雪有多大，溪上的吊橋也都被雪冰封了！\n\n: You can imagine how heavy the snowfall was before—the suspension bridge over the stream was completely frozen with snow and ice!
translations.可以順便蓋印章搜集明信片。\n\n: You can also collect stamps while gathering postcards.
translations.吃了豬排飯 跟 名物炸鯽魚 (蠻好吃的)\n: Ate pork cutlet rice and the specialty fried crucian carp (quite delicious).
translations.吃完收一收 Checkout 後就直奔機場了。\n\n: After eating and packing up, we checked out and headed straight to the airport.
translations.吃完還有點餓，去附近超商買點宵夜回去吃。\n\n: Still a bit hungry after eating, went to a nearby convenience store to buy some late-night snacks to eat back at the hotel.
translations.吃飽慢慢走回大通站，想去 [札幌電視塔](https://maps.app.go: After eating, we slowly walked back to Odori Station, intending to visit the [Sapporo TV Tower](https://maps.app.goo.gl/HdrBr15BZhTY9xoy5){:target="_blank"}. On the way, we passed by Sapporo's most famous intersection.
After eating, continue walking along the Otaru Canal, heading towards the [Otaru Steam Clock](https://maps.app.goo.gl/fX5yyT2tVRV8Lo98A){:target="_blank"}.
translations.吃飽走來最後一逛，東急百貨。\n\n: After eating, we took a final stroll to Tokyu Department Store.
translations.同樣在 KKday 購買 5G 吃到飽 eSIM，這次在北海道使用只有在美瑛深山: Also purchased the 5G unlimited eSIM on KKday. This time in Hokkaido, the signal was only lost once in the remote mountains of Biei; otherwise, it worked fine. This time, I specifically chose a plan that supports ChatGPT for easy information lookup.
translations.四季來看都有不同風景，今天是夕陽若隱若現的雪景。\n\n: Each season offers different scenery. Today features a snowy landscape with the sunset faintly visible.
translations.回程想說 11:00 Checkout 後在溫泉街走一走再回去，所以訂 13:1: For the return trip, I planned to check out at 11:00 and walk around the hot spring street before leaving, so I booked the 13:15 departure (boarding at Shiraito Falls at 13:31) bus.
translations.回飯店的路上買了每天經過 JR 車站都很多人都在排的三明治販賣機。\n\n: On the way back to the hotel, I bought sandwiches from a vending machine near the JR station that had a long line of people every day.
translations.因為是觀光巴士所以直接把行李箱交給工作人員放車廂就可以。\n: Since it is a sightseeing bus, you can directly hand your suitcase to the staff to store it in the luggage compartment.
translations.在札幌塔待到大約 18:30 看完夜景就下來了。\n\n: Stayed at Sapporo Tower until about 18:30 and came down after enjoying the night view.
translations.在這邊買了很多餅乾伴手禮，尤其是北海道才買得到的 — 六花亭。\n\n: Bought many cookie souvenirs here, especially the exclusive Hokkaido brand — Rokkatei.
translations.報到托運可能是因為提早來所以沒花多久時間，出境人蠻多的但也消化的很快，大約 06: Check-in and baggage drop likely took little time because we arrived early. There were many people at immigration, but the process moved quickly. We cleared immigration around 06:40.
translations.大通站附近走一走後就回札幌站了，大部分吃的也都關門了。\n\n: After walking around near Odori Station, we returned to Sapporo Station. Most of the food places were already closed.
translations.宵夜是超商熱狗＋哈密瓜酒(也不錯)＋養樂多 1000 減糖版，補充乳酸菌(其實每: Late-night snack was a convenience store hot dog + melon liqueur (not bad) + Yakult 1000 reduced sugar version, to replenish probiotics (actually drink it every day, just too lazy to take photos).
translations.富良野精靈台買的木製手作樂手\n: Wooden handmade musical instrument bought at Furano Fairy Hill
translations.小樽水族館雖然不大但是物種豐富、照顧的也不錯；展演也很多整體體驗不錯。\n: Although Otaru Aquarium is not large, it has a rich variety of species and is well maintained; there are many performances, making the overall experience quite good.
translations.小樽站正面出來過馬路右邊就是巴士站，直接在 3月台 等候前往 **１０小樽水族館: Exit Otaru Station from the front, cross the street, and the bus stop is on the right. Wait at platform 3 for the **10 Otaru Aquarium Line:**
translations.幸好路上超商蠻多家的，去全家順路買了宵夜晚上吃。\n: Fortunately, there were many convenience stores along the way, so I stopped by FamilyMart to buy a late-night snack.
translations.往 [小樽蒸汽鐘](https://maps.app.goo.gl/fX5yyT: There are many small shops, souvenir stores, and glassware shops around the [Otaru Steam Clock](https://maps.app.goo.gl/fX5yyT2tVRV8Lo98A){:target="_blank"}.
translations.從神宮跟公園慢慢走回地鐵站準備回札幌站附近吃晚餐了。\n\n: Walked slowly back from the shrine and park to the subway station, preparing to return near Sapporo Station for dinner.
translations.從這座人行鐵橋往下看就是結冰的白鬚瀑布。\n\n: Looking down from this pedestrian iron bridge is the frozen Shirahige Waterfall.
translations.感謝您看到這裡，一起體驗北海道的各種風景，下個地方再見！\n\n: Thank you for reading this far and experiencing the various sights of Hokkaido with me. See you at the next destination!
translations.我們的車是 13:15 從起始站發車，預計是 13:31 才會到白絲瀑布站，等待: Our bus departs from the starting station at 13:15 and is expected to arrive at Shiraito Falls station at 13:31. The waiting time is boring, so we stepped on the snow.
translations.我們的飯店離 **(2) [白絲瀑布/白糸の滝/Shiraitonotaki](: Our hotel is closer to **(2) [Shiraito Falls/白糸の滝/Shiraitonotaki](https://jozankei.jp/tw/spot/1449/){:target="_blank"}**, so we booked to get off at this stop.
translations.扭了一個火災報警器跟一些有趣的扭蛋。\n\n: Twisted a fire alarm and some interesting capsule toys.
translations.扭了平交道、招牌燈、車鑰匙、火災報警器、唐吉訶德公仔、日本隊球衣\n: Twisted railroad crossing, signboard lights, car keys, fire alarm, Don Quijote figurine, Japan team jersey
translations.接近路底就能看到 LeTAO 運河店：\n\n: Near the end of the street, you can see LeTAO Canal Shop:
translations.搭到的是華航比較新的飛機 Airbus A330–300，空間蠻大的，電視機上娛: The flight was on a newer China Airlines aircraft, the Airbus A330–300, which has a spacious cabin and well-equipped in-flight entertainment system.
translations.搭車到薄野站準備去吃札幌有名的「羊肉」烤肉。\n\n: Take the train to Susukino Station to enjoy the famous "lamb" barbecue in Sapporo.
translations.整個神社都被大雪冰封了。\n\n: The entire shrine was frozen under heavy snow and ice.
translations.整體來說跟之前「 [KKDAY 高千穗一日遊，高千穗神社、高千穗峽谷、天岩戸神社: Overall, it was similar to my previous experience with "[KKDAY Takachiho One-Day Tour: Takachiho Shrine, Takachiho Gorge, Ama-no-Iwato Shrine, Amano-Yasugawara](https://zhgchg.li/posts/z-%E5%BA%A6%E6%97%85%E8%A1%8C%E9%81%8A%E8%A8%98/%E4%B9%9D%E5%B7%9E%E8%87%AA%E7%94%B1%E8%A1%8C%E6%94%BB%E7%95%A5-%E9%87%9C%E5%B1%B1%E6%96%B0%E5%B1%B1%E8%8C%B6%E8%8A%B1%E8%99%9F%E9%83%B5%E8%BC%AA%E5%85%A5%E5%A2%83%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%AC%E5%8D%9A%E5%A4%9A-%E6%B7%B1%E5%85%A5%E7%94%B1%E5%B8%83%E9%99%A2-%E5%A4%A7%E5%88%86-%E7%A6%8F%E5%B2%A1%E7%AD%89%E5%9C%B0-cb65fd5ab770/#day-9-kkday-%E9%AB%98%E5%8D%83%E7%A9%97%E4%B8%80%E6%97%A5%E9%81%8A%E9%AB%98%E5%8D%83%E7%A9%97%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE%E9%AB%98%E5%8D%83%E7%A9%97%E5%B3%BD%E8%B0%B7%E5%A4%A9%E5%B2%A9%E6%88%B8%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE%E5%A4%A9%E5%AE%89%E6%B2%B3%E5%8E%9F){:target="_blank"}": it’s mostly a quick bus tour. Visiting these spots on your own is quite troublesome since half the route is highway and the other half is mountain roads through unpopulated areas (which feel like bear country). This time, we were in a small group and the driver sped aggressively, so we returned to the city earlier than expected.
translations.新千歲機場到札幌站的 JR 我看班次很多加上飛機落地時間抓不太準就沒先買票；前往: There are many JR trains from New Chitose Airport to Sapporo Station, and since the flight arrival time is uncertain, I didn't buy tickets in advance. To get to Jozankei Onsen, you can only take a bus. According to the [latest transportation information as of December 2025](https://jozankei.jp/tw/news/newaccess/){:target="_blank"}, there are three routes to choose from:
translations.新工作做了快半年加上手上專案剛結束，也從沒去過下雪的日本，於是就在 3 月中來場: I have been working at my new job for almost half a year and just finished a project. Since I have never been to snowy Japan, I decided to take a trip to Hokkaido in mid-March.
translations.旁邊斜坡往下走就是溫泉公園。\n\n: The slope beside leads down to the hot spring park.
translations.日本的服務就是安心，這裡也會有工作人員確認你是要去定山溪的並且有預約的。\n: Japanese service is reliable; here, staff will also confirm that you are going to Jozankei and have a reservation.
translations.是小企鵝，有點像南崁企鵝。\n\n: They are little penguins, somewhat like the ones in Nankan.
translations.時間接近傍晚了，開始往回走。\n\n: It's getting close to evening, so we started heading back.
translations.時間會因為季節而有所不同請 [參考官網資訊](https://uu-beihai: Opening hours may vary by season. Please [refer to the official website](https://uu-beihaidao.tw/corporate/otaru-aq.shtml){:target="_blank"}.
translations.晚餐很早就吃，所以宵夜要多吃一點；買了超商泡麵＋串燒＋炸雞還有草莓水果酒(好喝): Dinner was early, so I had to eat more for a late-night snack; I bought convenience store instant noodles, skewers, fried chicken, and strawberry fruit wine (delicious), plus [**Hokkaido The Sapporo Bar collaboration whiskey chocolate ice cream**](https://the-sapporo-bar.susukino-brewing.com/){:target="_blank"} (it really has alcohol flavor and tastes quite good).
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.札幌農學校(牛奶餅乾)、烤玉米餅乾(膨化) 也不錯\n: Sapporo Agricultural School (milk cookies) and roasted corn crackers (puffed) are also good.
translations.查了一下車站附近還有一個夜市還有營業就走去看看，隨便都好，吃個什麼。\n\n: I checked and found there was a night market still open near the station, so I decided to walk over and take a look. Anything would do, just to grab a bite.
translations.沒搭到 18:00 快速機場回札幌的，隨便搭了一班回去(比較慢)。\n\n: Missed the 18:00 express airport bus to Sapporo, so took a random slower bus back.
translations.海豚館外也有一個小的企鵝池：\n\n: Outside the dolphinarium, there is also a small penguin pool:
translations.海豹活動：來的時候 11:20 正在表演\n: Seal Activity: At 11:20 when we arrived, a show was in progress
translations.溫泉街幾乎都是泊+食，所以外面的餐廳不多；最後走去另一家飯店 [万世閣](htt: The hot spring street mostly offers lodging with meals, so there are few restaurants outside; finally, we walked to the izakaya on the 3rd floor of another hotel, [万世閣](https://maps.app.goo.gl/x1Wu1bSFXkk8PDbm7){:target="_blank"}, for dinner.
translations.物種也蠻豐富的。\n\n: The species are also quite diverse.
translations.特色是戶外港口圈養、有很多展演跟冬季會有企鵝走路巡迴\n: Features include outdoor port enclosures, many performances, and a penguin walking tour during winter.
translations.百貨公司快關門了，最後再逛逛。\n\n: The department store is about to close, so let's take one last look around.
translations.直接在櫃檯出示線上買的 [【官方銷售】北海道小樽水族館門票 (即買即用/購票後: Simply show the QR code of the online purchased [【Official Sale】Hokkaido Otaru Aquarium Admission Ticket (Instant Use/Valid Within 30 Days After Purchase)](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw/product/139823-otaru-aquarium-admission-ticket-hokkaido?cid=19365){:target="_blank"} at the counter to enter directly.
translations.看完回到本館參觀市內的海洋生物：\n\n: After the visit, return to the main building to explore the marine life in the city:
translations.看完後往海豚館方向移動：\n\n: After watching, head towards the dolphinarium:
translations.看完海豹之後就來企鵝散步路線等，地板有一條白線，站在線外等企鵝經過；我站在轉角這: After watching the sea lions, I went to the penguin walking route. There is a white line on the floor; stand outside the line and wait for the penguins to pass by. I stood at the corner here (where the person is in the photo above).
translations.看完表演隔壁是海豹池，每一隻都很愜意。\n\n: Next to the show is the seal pool, where each seal looks very relaxed.
translations.看這人潮就知道很多人來小樽了。\n\n: You can tell many people come to Otaru by looking at the crowd.
translations.第一天：到札幌後直接去定山溪溫泉住一晚\n: Day 1: After arriving in Sapporo, go straight to Jozankei Onsen for an overnight stay
translations.第一杯: 正 — Sapporo 生啤酒\n: First Drink: Draft — Sapporo Draft Beer
translations.第二天：回札幌市區逛景點\n: Day 2: Return to Sapporo City for Sightseeing
translations.第六天：前往機場返程\n: Day 6: Head to the Airport for Departure
translations.第四天： [**KKday 北海道點燈之旅 ｜富良野精靈台＆美瑛青池＆白鬚瀑布一: Day 4: [**KKday Hokkaido Illumination Tour ｜ Furano Fairy Platform & Biei Blue Pond & Shirahige Falls One-Day Tour ｜ Departure from Sapporo**](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw/product/157133-hokkaido-sapporo-biei-blue-pond-illumination-tour-japan?cid=19365){:target="_blank"}
translations.紅色是企鵝散步路線\n: The red line is the penguin walking route
translations.經過這裡之後往前再往下走就會回到起點飯店了。\n\n: After passing here, go forward and then down to return to the starting hotel.
translations.繼續往上走路過一家麵包店，有剛出爐的蘋果可頌，買了一個來嚐鮮，味道不錯。\n\n: Continuing uphill, I passed a bakery that had freshly baked apple croissants. I bought one to try, and it tasted good.
translations.繼續走路上會經過神宮茶屋，先去吃個北海道牛奶冰淇淋。\n\n: Continue walking and you will pass Jingu Chaya, where you can first enjoy some Hokkaido milk ice cream.
translations.肉非常好吃，完全沒有羊騷味，肉質很嫩。\n: The meat was very delicious, with no gamey taste at all, and the texture was very tender.
translations.草莓起司派(台灣後來也開賣) — 草莓果醬＋起司\n: Strawberry Cheesecake Pie (also later sold in Taiwan) — strawberry jam + cheese
translations.要拐個彎走下坡；結果悲報，也是被雪冰封了沒有開放。\n\n: I had to take a detour downhill; unfortunately, it was also closed due to being frozen by snow and ice.
translations.要注意 **紅色字的班次只有秋冬季有行駛** 、札幌站 16:00/17:00: Note that **the trips marked in red only operate in autumn and winter**, and the departures from Sapporo Station at 16:00 and 17:00 only go as far as the Jozankei Bus Garage.
translations.買了一個木頭月對手做紀念品\n\n: Bought a wooden moon-shaped handmade souvenir
translations.買了一個麵包跟超商熟食當路上的晚餐。\n\n: Bought a bread and convenience store ready-to-eat meal for dinner on the road.
translations.買了兩個御守，比較特別的是交通御守，可以掛在車內跟有一個貼紙可以貼在機車、腳踏車: Bought two omamori charms. The special one is the traffic safety charm, which can be hung inside a car, and it comes with a sticker that can be placed on a motorcycle, bicycle, or helmet.
translations.買個麥當勞早餐在車上吃。\n\n: Bought a McDonald's breakfast to eat in the car.
translations.走站前大道往小樽運河方向走。\n\n: Walk along Ekimae Avenue toward the Otaru Canal.
translations.趁空檔先 [啟用日本 eSIM](https://www.kkday.com/z: Activate the [Japan eSIM](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw/product/137689-japan-unlimited-data-esim-card?cid=19365){:target="_blank"} during your free time.
translations.跟來時候一樣是新的空客飛機，位置大、娛樂設施新。\n\n: Same as the flight here, it's a new Airbus plane with spacious seats and updated entertainment systems.
translations.路上有一家 [北一硝子 Outlet](https://maps.app.goo: There is a [Kitaichi Glass Outlet](https://maps.app.goo.gl/eq7F2zZ5P6RuUJ1H6){:target="_blank"} on the way that sells Hokkaido local sake with free tasting.
translations.車程時間約 50 分鐘，3 月中市區已經沒什麼雪了，郊外還有些許積雪\n: The drive takes about 50 minutes. By mid-March, there is little snow in the city, but some snow remains in the outskirts.
translations.這樣狂吃一人大約才 $700 台幣。\n: Eating this much costs about 700 TWD per person.
translations.這次行李等了超久…\n\n: This time, the luggage took forever to arrive...
translations.這航次華航提供全程的訊息 WiFi 功能，可以跟朋友傳訊息聊天。\n\n: This flight offers full in-flight WiFi service through China Airlines, allowing you to chat and message with friends.
translations.這裡有一家 MEGA 整棟的 [唐吉訶德](https://maps.app.g: There is a whole building MEGA [Don Quijote](https://maps.app.goo.gl/t9UREfvkAkyNrCim6){:target="_blank"} here.
translations.這裡有遊客中心可以上廁所，後面就是富良野滑雪場。\n\n: There is a tourist center here with restrooms, and right behind it is the Furano Ski Resort.
translations.這邊只有上坡有手扶梯，下坡蠻抖的。\n\n: There is only an escalator going uphill here; the downhill is quite shaky.
translations.這邊後面還有一家唐吉訶德可以在托運前最後採購：\n\n: There is also a Don Quijote nearby for last-minute shopping before check-in:
translations.這邊樓上也有玩具、扭蛋。\n\n: There are also toys and capsule toys upstairs here.
translations.這邊除了有賣伴手禮也有賣冰淇淋甜點還有熟食咖啡廳 [ルタオ小樽運河店 三番庫カフ: Here, they sell souvenirs, ice cream desserts, and also have a deli café [ルタオ小樽運河店 三番庫カフェ](https://maps.app.goo.gl/K9PY2rFURawPitX38){:target="_blank"}.
translations.逛完紀念品店後，我們就回到來時的巴士站等車。\n\n: After visiting the souvenir shop, we returned to the bus stop where we arrived to wait for the bus.
translations.過個馬路到底就是公園入口了：\n\n: Just cross the street, and you'll reach the park entrance:
translations.還有點時間就繼續去附近的白絲瀑布看看。\n\n: With some time left, we continued to visit the nearby Shiraito Falls.
translations.配了第 *一天有喝的草莓酒跟北海道牛奶冰淇淋。*\n\n: Had strawberry wine and Hokkaido milk ice cream on the *first day.*
translations.隨便選了一家有烤串的 (主要是烤鰻魚)，先吃一點。\n\n: Randomly picked a place with grilled skewers (mainly grilled eel) to have a quick bite.
translations.隨便點了個義大利麵熟食果腹，還有甜點套餐(蛋糕好吃)。\n\n: I casually ordered a cooked Italian pasta to fill my stomach, along with a dessert set (the cake was delicious).
translations.集合地點： [大通地鐵站 31 號出口](https://maps.app.go: Meeting point: [Odori Subway Station Exit 31](https://maps.app.goo.gl/dgPQLs75bVNTbVPR9){:target="_blank"}. You will receive a pre-trip notification email the day before with contact details for the guide/driver.
translations.離登機還有一點時間先去 [D1 坐個免費按摩椅(代幣可以跟附近商家索取)](ht: There is still some time before boarding, so first go to [D1 to use a free massage chair (tokens can be requested from nearby shops)](https://zhgchg.li/posts/z-%E5%BA%A6%E6%97%85%E8%A1%8C%E9%81%8A%E8%A8%98/%E6%9D%B1%E4%BA%AC%E8%87%AA%E7%94%B1%E8%A1%8C%E6%94%BB%E7%95%A5-%E5%B7%9D%E8%B6%8A%E5%B0%8F%E6%B1%9F%E6%88%B6%E4%B8%80%E6%97%A5%E9%81%8A%E8%88%87%E7%86%B1%E6%B5%B7%E6%B5%B7%E4%B8%8A%E8%8A%B1%E7%81%AB%E5%A4%A7%E6%9C%83%E5%85%A8%E7%B4%80%E9%8C%84-958599363857/#%E4%BA%8C%E8%88%AA%E5%87%BA%E5%A2%83%E5%85%8D%E7%A8%85%E5%BA%97-le-labo){:target="_blank"}.
translations.電視塔出來下一個路口就是 Parco 札幌店，來逛逛街。\n\n: Right after exiting the TV Tower, the next intersection is Parco Sapporo store. Let's go shopping.
translations.非常傳統日式，整個飯店都是木造建築，入廳就是榻榻米要換鞋子放鞋櫃。\n\n: Very traditional Japanese style, the entire hotel is made of wood. Upon entering the lobby, there is tatami flooring where you need to change shoes and put them in the shoe cabinet.
translations.順便瞄一眼 Le Labo 2026 / 札幌 買的價格：\n\n: Quick glance at Le Labo 2026 / Sapporo prices:
translations.預約訂位成功會收到 Email 通知， **不需要再去兌換直接在 [車票網站線上: You will receive an email notification once your reservation is confirmed. **No need to exchange tickets in person; simply activate them online at [the ticket website](https://jotetsu.quicktrip.jp/bought){:target="_blank"} and show it to the driver.**
translations.飛機餐一樣普普：\n\n: The airplane meal was just so-so:
translations.飯店有一泊二食，我們訂一泊一食(早餐)；出去找找吃的。\n\n: The hotel offers half board, but we booked a plan with only breakfast; we went out to find food for other meals.
translations.飯店走到 JR/地鐵站的路上就有一家 Yodobashi (後面有 [麥當勞](: On the way from the hotel to the JR/subway station, there is a Yodobashi (with a [McDonald's](https://maps.app.goo.gl/3xn9SZskRd8Yzr2t9){:target="_blank"} nearby). I went to check out the capsule toy machines.
translations.飯店附近有一家評價蠻高＋可以外帶(太累)的湯咖喱，買回飯店吃。\n\n: There is a highly-rated soup curry place near the hotel that offers takeout (too tired to dine out), so we bought it back to the hotel to eat.
translations.點了兩份招牌跟一份一般的肉還有白飯、生啤(大杯…有點太大杯)。\n: Ordered two signature dishes, one regular meat, white rice, and draft beer (large size... a bit too large).
translations.點飲料送餐包＋單點炸蝦漢堡\n: Order a drink and get a free meal bun + a la carte fried shrimp burger
